title: Offsec: Consult Before Registering a Guided Plan
applies_when: the target picture is still unclear
a true replan is needed after target drift
prefer: call offsec_consult before registering or re-registering the plan
carry the returned corpus framing into the plan note and book shortlist
let methodology narrowing happen before bounded execution
avoid: registering a guided plan before the target picture is narrowed
starting run_command loops without a fresh consult after material target drift
signal: new guided run without stable target framing
target picture materially changed since the last plan
confidence_note: Derived from the current guided Offsec contract and runtime rules.

title: Offsec: Prefer Official Docs Before Broad Web Search for Exact Syntax
applies_when: the corpus gives the method but exact flags are blocking
version-specific behavior or config details matter
tool syntax failures repeat after a method-level consult
prefer: check official or project docs first
use GitHub or project-maintained documentation for exact flags and config shape
keep broad web search as a later fallback
avoid: going straight to broad web search for syntax or flag details
re-consulting the corpus repeatedly for version-specific exactness
signal: version-specific blocker after methodology is already known
confidence_note: Matches the current Offsec harness policy and guidance.

title: Research: Prefer Local Corpus Before Answering From Weights
applies_when: the question is compatible with the local corpus
the chat prefers grounded local reference work
local corpus tools are available for the active science workflow
prefer: frame the problem before retrieval when the lane supports it
use local corpus narrowing and evidence tools before unsupported synthesis
answer from retrieved evidence when the corpus is strong enough
avoid: jumping straight to answer-from-weights when local evidence is available
mixing retrieval and synthesis before narrowing the source set
signal: reference-heavy question compatible with the local corpus
local corpus tools available in a grounded science workflow
confidence_note: Matches the current local-corpus prefer contract and selector guidance.
